market_regime.interpretation: Levels are less reliable. Gamma flip zone is a transition area. Expect larger swings and whipsaws. Use caution.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: HIGH: Combined GEX at -1.54B (all expiries negative). Dealers short gamma will amplify any directional move. Expect erratic price action with potential for sharp swings. Volatility suppression unlikely.
outlook.summary: Bearish structure confirmed by negative gamma exposure across all timeframes and elevated put/call ratios (0DTE PCR 1.25). Spot caught in magnetic tug-of-war between 0DTE max pain (581) and weekly max pain (585). Heavy put accumulation at 570-580 creates layered support. 600 stands as the critical upside barrier with resonance across all expiries. Skew shifts bearish in weekly/monthly (1.22-1.26). Watch for volatility spikes on any breach of 580 support or 590 resistance.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE across all expiries. Dominant call OI: 41.8K 0DTE + 6.2K Weekly + 37K Monthly. Major dealer hedging ceiling. Upside rejection likely.
RESONANCE put wall. 40K Monthly OI dominant. Extreme 0DTE volume (113K vol / 16K OI = 7.0x ratio). Strong institutional hedging zone.
Weekly max pain + high 0DTE volume (74K CALL vol). Only 0.25% from spot. Mixed OI creates pinning behavior. Primary attraction zone.
CONFLUENCE support. 24K 0DTE + 32K Monthly put OI. High volume (83K) confirms institutional positioning. First defense above 570.
Monthly max pain + significant mixed OI (31K PUT + 21K CALL). Bearish skew (1.26) validates resistance. 1.1% above spot.
0DTE max pain level. 0.44% below spot. MM target for option value minimization today. Downside attraction if momentum builds.
0DTE put wall with extreme volume (115K vol / 20K OI = 5.8x ratio). Heavy intraday hedging. Critical scalp support.
CONFLUENCE secondary support. 18.5K 0DTE + 20K Monthly put OI. Deep OTM hedge zone for tail risk protection.
